title_en: Buying a Living Room Sofa Set
description: Follow Mr. Zhang as he visits the showroom, finds the perfect sofa, negotiates, and arranges delivery.
visual_style: See style-guide.md for full consistency rules

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang enters. Li Wei greets him warmly.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Hello, welcome to our showroom. My name is Li Wei.
lines.zh: 您好，欢迎光临我们的展厅。我叫李伟。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Hi, I'm looking for a sofa set for my new apartment.
lines.zh: 你好，我在为新公寓找一套沙发。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Great! Please take your time. Here is our latest catalogue.
lines.zh: 太好了！请慢慢看。这是我们最新的目录。

scenes.description: Li Wei shows a modern grey fabric sofa.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: This three-seater sofa is very popular right now.
lines.zh: 这款三人沙发现在非常受欢迎。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: I like the color. Is the fabric easy to clean?
lines.zh: 我喜欢这个颜色。面料好打理吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Yes, it's a premium performance fabric. Very durable and stain-resistant.
lines.zh: 是的，这是高级功能面料，非常耐用且防污。

scenes.description: They measure and discuss size together.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: It is 220 centimeters wide, 95 deep, and 85 high.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Perfect. It should fit my living room very well.
lines.zh: 太好了，应该很适合我的客厅。

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang sits on the sofa to test it.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Would you like to sit and try it?

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Sure. It's quite comfortable. The cushions are firm but soft.
lines.zh: 好的。坐着很舒服，靠垫结实又柔软。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: We also have a matching armchair and coffee table.
lines.zh: 我们还有配套的单人椅和茶几。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: How much is the full set?

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: The sofa, armchair and coffee table together are 18,800 RMB.
lines.zh: 沙发、单人椅和茶几一共18800元。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Can you give me a better price? I'm furnishing the whole apartment.
lines.zh: 能再便宜一点吗？我要装修整个公寓。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: I can offer 15% off if you decide today. Free delivery and installation.
lines.zh: 如果今天决定，我可以给您打八五折。免费送货安装。

scenes.description: They finalize the order and discuss schedule.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Alright, I'll take the set. When can you deliver?
lines.zh: 好的，我要这套了。什么时候可以送货？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: We can deliver and install next Tuesday morning between 9 and 12.
lines.zh: 我们可以在下周二上午9点到12点送货并安装。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Perfect. Thank you very much for your help.
lines.zh: 太好了。非常感谢你的帮助。
